Dameng 指标采集耗时过长: Dameng metric collection taking too long
Dameng 缓存命中率过低: Dameng cache hit ratio too low
存在轻量级锁竞争，会导致SQL执行延迟: Lightweight lock contention detected, which delays SQL execution
缓存命中率低于95%会导致大量磁盘IO，性能下降: Cache hit ratio below 95% causes heavy disk IO and degrades performance
采集耗时过长反映数据库响应慢，可能导致监控数据延迟: Long collection time indicates a slow database response and may delay monitoring data
